system.descriptor: Security is the skill of bypassing, disabling, or setting locks, alarms, traps, and other security measures.
system.uses:
Uses: Picking locks, disabling alarms, bypassing security systems, setting traps, cracking safes, detecting security measures.
Security tests are typically opposed by the quality of the security system. Simple locks may require a +20 test, while sophisticated Mechanicus-forged systems may impose -30 or worse. Proper tools (such as a multikey or lascutter) may be required; improvised tools impose penalties.

description.value: Security is the skill of bypassing, disabling, or setting locks, alarms, traps, and other security measures.
